arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola's close pal reveals reasons Man City manager has split with wife of 30 years
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola has reportedly split from wife Cristina Serra with those close to the couple hinting that the relentless work rate of the manager was a factor

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp on Man City charges and Liverpool being awarded titles - 'I buy the beer!'
arts.sum: Liverpool were twice narrowly beaten in the race for the Premier League crown by Manchester City but it has been claimed that they could be stripped of their titles amid an ongoing legal battle

arts.ttl: Man City greats pay tribute to title-winner Tony Book after his death aged 90
arts.sum: Book lifted four major trophies as a player and one as a manager with City.

arts.ttl: Reasons behind Pep Guardiola's marriage ending are revealed by close friend, as Man City manager steps out still wearing his wedding ring following split from wife Cristina after 30 years
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE BY EIRIAN JANE PROSSER IN BARCELONA: Pep has split from his fashion designer wife Cristina Serra after being together for three decades, it was revealed on Monday night.

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp promises to throw a PARTY for all his former Liverpool players if Man City are found guilty of financial breaches and stripped of their Premier League titles
arts.sum: DOMINIC KING IN SALZBURG: Jurgen Klopp has promised to throw a garden party for all his former Liverpool colleagues if Manchester City's titles are taken away from them.

arts.sum: Former Manchester City captain Tony Book dies at the age of 90.
